---
title: "Edward Ge"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: edwardge3901@gmail.com
      href: mailto:edwardge3901@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhijian-ge-9521372b8/
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/EdwardGe3901
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/auster039/
    - icon: chat-fill
      text: QQ
      href: http://wpa.qq.com/msgrd?v=3&uin=1965330771&site=qq&menu=yes
---

::: {.lang-en}
Welcome to my website! I'm Edward Ge passionate about Data Analyst and Market Prediction.

I use this space to share my projects, research, and thoughts.
Feel free to explore and reach out!
:::

::: {.lang-zh}
欢迎来到我的个人网站！我是葛智健，热衷于数据分析和市场预测。

这里是我分享项目、研究和想法的地方，欢迎随意浏览，也欢迎联系我！
:::
